{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.98%, VIX +8.67% to 18.30, broad-based selling across Auto/PSU Bank/Realty. Defensive rotation into IT/FMCG/Pharma visible. With book already 65% deployed across 15 names and most positions barely positive on day 1, focus is position management not new admits. Macro: US-Iran tension + CPI print Tuesday = binary event within 1 session — Rule 11 suggests caution on new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1073.10,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD-equivalent. +10.5% winner on Q4 beat + brokerage upgrades (ICICI target 1350). Stored SL 1073.10 vs CMP 1087.20 gap is only 1.3% — below the 1.0% trail-gap floor minimum is fine but tightening further would force-exit. Original SL 1073.10 already locks in ~+9% gain. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+10.5% on Q4 beat. SL 1073.10 already at +9% locked; CMP-SL gap 1.3% — adequate cushion. Hold for target 1135 (R 24, target run 48 from CMP = R:R favorable). Bullish research +0.10 modifier intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",

      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.0% with VIX spiking +8.67% and geopolitical tensions intact — gold thesis holding. SL 121.00 (-3.4% from CMP) appropriate for ETF volatility. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4% with strong Q4 (rev +22%, PAT +18%). Stored SL is at entry 820 — moving SL to 822 (above entry breakeven, 1.1% below CMP 831.30 — within trail-gap discipline). FMCG defensive rotation supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "reasoning": "+8.9% post-Q4. CMP 1371.10, stored SL 1352.00 — gap 1.4%, within trail-gap floor. SL already locks in +7.4% gain. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {

      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",

      "product": "CNC",

    },

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%. Q4 PAT +16%, raised FY27 guidance to low-double-digit. SL 472 (-2.5% from CMP) appropriate for swing. Bullish research +0.12; FMCG rotation supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.7%. Q4 results pending in May = binary event Rule 11. Research NEUTRAL with Kotak Sell target 800. SL 1190 (-3.6% from CMP) gives room. NOT trimming yet because position is small (~2% capital) — within event-trade size band. Watch for Q4 date announcement."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1073.10, "reasoning": "SL locks +9% gain; gap to CMP 1.3% — at trail-gap floor."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 121.00, "reasoning": "Geopolitical hedge intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 822.00, "reasoning": "Move SL just above entry to breakeven+; 1.1% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1352.00, "reasoning": "SL locks +7.4%; further tightening breaches 1.0% floor."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 3000.00, "reasoning": "Defense premium intact."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "SL above entry; gap to CMP 1.4%."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1465.00, "reasoning": "Q4 strong; SL tight, respect it."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1580.00, "reasoning": "Watch — sector underperformance flag."},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 2755.00, "reasoning": "SL at trail floor."},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 9020.00, "reasoning": "Record Q4, multiple target upgrades."},
    {"symbol": "BHARATFORG", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1955.00, "reasoning": "Defense growth + auto recovery thesis."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 354.00, "reasoning": "Q4 +30.6%; ride through BFSI noise."},
    {"symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 10440.00, "reasoning": "Buyback + dividend catalysts; auto sector noise."},
    {"symbol": "DABUR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 472.00, "reasoning": "Bullish research +0.12; FMCG rotation."},
    {"symbol": "LAURUSLABS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1190.00, "reasoning": "Q4 pending; small position fits event-trade size."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "HFCL OPEN MIS BUY @ 133.50 placed earlier — CANCEL not emitted as MIS LIMIT will auto-expire EOD; let market decide. New BULLISH candidates considered but rejected: (1) DABUR +0.12 already held; (2) BERGEPAINT -0.08 BEARISH plus board meeting tomorrow (Rule 11 binary in 1 session) — NO_ACTION; (3) BAJAJ-AUTO already held; (4) POLYCAB already held at full size 5%; (5) CAMS already held; (6) ABCAPITAL already held — adding would push BFSI cluster (PNBHOUSING + CAMS + ABCAPITAL = ~26% capital) closer to discipline limit; (7) THERMAX/NUVAMA/CRAFTSMAN volume surges intriguing but no deep data provided this batch; (8) TITAN/APOLLOHOSP/INFY/PERSISTENT — no full data this batch. Book at 65% deployed with 15 names; VIX +8.67% + CPI tomorrow argues against piling on. The Day-13 anti-pattern is noted but today's macro (CPI binary + VIX spike) is genuine risk-off justification per Rule 18.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified across BFSI (PNBHOUSING/CAMS/ABCAPITAL ~26%), FMCG (MARICO/DABUR ~10%), IT (COFORGE ~4%), Chemicals (PIDILITIND/SRF ~7%), Pharma (WOCKPHARMA/LAURUSLABS ~7%), Defense (GRSE ~5%), Capital Goods (POLYCAB/BHARATFORG ~10%), Auto (BAJAJ-AUTO ~4%), Gold ETF (~5%). 65% deployed, 35% cash — within healthy bands. Today's strategy: (a) Trail MARICO SL above breakeven, (b) HOLD all other positions with intact theses through CPI print noise, (c) NO new admits given VIX +8.67% + binary CPI in <24h. This is a deliberate risk-off pause, not anchoring — explicit per-name reject reasoning provided in watchlist_notes."
}
